task: Keystatic CMS Schema Expansion + Affiliate Content Structure
context: This is a multi-tenant white-label e-commerce engine built on Astro 5, Tailwind CSS v4, Alpine.js, and Snipcart v3. The engine uses Astro's Content Layer API (NOT legacy collections — use entry.id NOT entry.slug). A full site audit was recently completed. The critical bugs have already been fixed. Your job now is two things: (1) Expand the Keystatic CMS config to match the full schema defined in src/content/config.ts — many product fields are missing from the CMS dashboard. (2) Create the missing content folder structure for the affiliate_zee brand. Do NOT touch any layout files, page files, component files, or the config.ts schema. Only edit keystatic.config.ts and create new content stub files.
rules: NEVER use process.env. Always use import.meta.env for all environment variables.
NEVER use entry.slug. The Content Layer API uses entry.id.
NEVER edit src/content/config.ts — the schemas there are the SOURCE OF TRUTH. Your job is to make keystatic.config.ts MATCH them.
NEVER edit any .astro component files, layout files, or page files.
All Keystatic field types must loosely match the Zod types in config.ts. Use fields.text() for strings, fields.integer() for numbers, fields.checkbox() for booleans, fields.array() for arrays.
Preserve all existing Keystatic collections and singletons. Only ADD to them — do not remove or restructure.
Brand ID for this deployment: zelia-vance. All content paths use this brand ID.

task_1_keystatic_expansion.description: The keystatic.config.ts file is missing about 80% of the product fields defined in src/content/config.ts. Add all missing fields to the Keystatic collections so content editors can manage them via the CMS dashboard.
task_1_keystatic_expansion.source_of_truth: src/content/config.ts — read this file FIRST before touching keystatic.config.ts
products_collection_missing_fields: gallery: array of strings (image paths) — maps to z.array(z.string()).optional()
tags: array of strings — maps to z.array(z.string()).optional()
badges: array of strings — maps to z.array(z.string()).optional()
variant_1: object with fields: name (string), values (string, comma-separated), price_modifiers (string, optional) — maps to z.object({...}).optional()
variant_2: same shape as variant_1 — maps to z.object({...}).optional()
variant_3: object with fields: name (string), values (string), is_checkbox (boolean, optional) — maps to z.object({...}).optional()
related_products: array of strings (product IDs) — maps to z.array(z.string()).optional()
dimensions: object with fields: length, width, height (all positive numbers) — maps to z.object({...}).optional()
lookbooks_collection_missing_fields: gallery: array of strings (image paths) — maps to z.array(z.string()).optional()
products: array of strings (product IDs) — maps to z.array(z.string()) — NOTE: this field is REQUIRED in the schema
blog_collection_missing_fields: tags: array of strings — maps to z.array(z.string()).optional()
settings_singleton_missing_fields: phone: object with optional fields: main (string), support (string)
address: object with optional fields: street, city, state, zip, country (all strings)
monetization: object with field: show_ads (boolean, default false) — maps to z.object({show_ads: z.boolean()}).optional()
task_1_keystatic_expansion.newsletter_collection_missing: The newsletter collection exists in src/content/config.ts but is ENTIRELY absent from keystatic.config.ts. Add it as a collection. Path pattern: src/content/{PUBLIC_BRAND_ID}/newsletter/**/*.{yml,yaml,json}. Schema: a record object where each key has fields: heading (string), description (string), success_message (string, optional).

task_2_affiliate_folder_structure.description: The src/content/affiliate_zee/ directory is missing critical content folders. Create them with placeholder stub files so the affiliate brand is structurally complete.
task_2_affiliate_folder_structure.note: The blog/ and settings/ folders already exist. Only products/ and lookbooks/ are missing. Use .gitkeep files — do not create fake product or lookbook content files.

verification_steps: 1. Read keystatic.config.ts after your changes and verify ALL fields from src/content/config.ts products schema are present.
2. Verify the newsletter collection is added to keystatic.config.ts with the correct path using import.meta.env.PUBLIC_BRAND_ID.
3. Verify src/content/affiliate_zee/products/ and src/content/affiliate_zee/lookbooks/ both exist.
4. Run: grep -n 'process.env' keystatic.config.ts — result must be EMPTY (zero matches). All env vars must use import.meta.env.

5. Produce a brief COMPLETION-REPORT.md in the .plans/ folder. List every field you added under each collection, and confirm the affiliate folder structure. Mark any fields you could not map cleanly and explain why.
